description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dfax_2, and is implemented by a call to dfax_2. Use this API to construct a Distribution Factor Data File (activity DFAX). This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = dfax(options, subfile, monfile, confile, dfxfile)
python_syntax: ierr = dfax(options, subfile, monfile, confile, dfxfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying calculation options. The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: subfile
parameters.description: Name of the subsystem description file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: monfile
parameters.description: Name of monitored element description file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: confile
parameters.description: Name of contingency description data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: distribution factor option flag (1 by default).
do not calculate distribution factors (i.e., DFAX,AC).
monitored element sorting flag (0 by default).
do not sort (i.e., leave in Monitored Element Description File order).

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
no Monitored Element Data input file specified.
no Contingency Description Data file specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
